content.text: The roster is fixed and core-maker is idle. I file the new unit as a task, then assign it to the existing core-maker via the task list (create-and-assign) instead of spawning a fresh teammate. The TaskCreate tool takes only subject + description, so the owner is set in the follow-up TaskUpdate.

input.subject: feat(ship): add --dry-run flag
input.description: Add a --dry-run flag to `t3 <overlay> ship` that prints the plan without publishing.
